text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon and I are heading back to the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I'm going to make a stop by the laboratory. I
want to see how my new concoction is coming
along.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It should be ready tomorrow, so we can move on
to the experiment in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, like any other day, Agnes Tachyon is
continuing her research and experimentation.
choice_data_list: Do you ever get tired of research?
Do you ever get tired of research?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What kind of question is that?! My work is
changing every day, you know!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's the same for my research. My understanding
of muscles, the organs, bone structure, and the
like...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What is considered conventional knowledge
today might be disproved tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is precisely why the path to body
modification is so involved and interesting.
choice_data_list: So, basically you don't have time to get tired.
So, basically you don't have time to get tired.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's right. So, now that you get it, I will see you
tomorrow. Good night, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Nice morning, isn't it? Here, take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Immediately after greeting me, she hands me a
pill which smells indescribably horrendous. I'm
forced to swallow it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! It makes you want to vomit, doesn't it? But
worry not, your suffering will turn out to be worth
it in the end!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You'll see what I'm talking about once it starts
taking effect! Now come on! Run around the track
with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run for an hour or so, but the effects Agnes
Tachyon mentioned don't seem to arrive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More than anything, the stench of the pill still
lingers in my mouth, making the whole experience
rather... torturous.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see... Your pulse when running is no different
than normal. No change in the color of your
muscles either.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You do seem a bit pale in the face... but, I'll
assume that's for another reason.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh! I've got it, Trainer! In short, this experiment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Is a failure!
choice_data_list: You're saying my suffering was for nothing?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, your time for the last 200 meters was a bit
faster than usual.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: The difference is almost insignificant, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As you were supposed to feel light as a feather,
this slight improvement might not be so—

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I heard you were doing dangerous experiments
like creating drugs to make you run faster, but...
I'm surprised the rumors are true.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You must also be a student at Tracen
Academy. Does this mean you're interested?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But first, allow me to correct one thing. The
concoctions I put together are—

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Please! Can I have some?! I... want to become
faster!

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm always losing... so I don't care if I cheat
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hold on a second. What I do here isn't
cheating...

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm begging you! I'll be waiting, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having said what she came to say, the
curly-haired Umamusume runs off.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...
choice_data_list: Let's tell her there's been a misunderstanding.
We should tell her to reconsider.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, if she really wants my
concoction, shouldn't she be helping me in
return?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
She just wants to take the fruits of my hard work.
I'm not impressed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, next time I see her, I'm going to make
sure she joins the experiment properly!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. I'm looking forward to this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon laughs merrily as she watches the
departing Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
She'll see. There's no such thing as cheating when
it comes to my experiments.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm intrigued. Her eyes were burning with
fighting spirit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yet, she seems so eager to utilize artificial
enhancements. I should look into this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon chuckles to herself as she watches
the departing Umamusume...
